note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.flowknot module functions.

method_groups.fix: fix_fluid, fix_proppant, fix_thermal, set_fix_fluid, set_fix_proppant, set_fix_thermal
method_groups.flux: flux_fluid_app, flux_thermal, flux_thermal_app, flux_thermal_unbal, set_flux_fluid_app, set_flux_thermal_app

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the area corresponding to the knot.

methods.name: bulk
methods.description: Get the fluid bulk modulus used by this flow knot.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the flowknot extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: fix_fluid
methods.description: Get the indicator of pore pressure variation.

methods.name: fix_proppant
methods.description: Get the flag of proppant variation (true = free; false = constant volume fraction).

methods.name: fix_thermal
methods.description: Get the thermal condition code (0 = free; 1 = constant temperature; 2 = constant flux).

methods.name: flux_fluid_app
methods.description: Get the additional flux source value.

methods.name: flux_thermal
methods.description: Get the heat flow sum.

methods.name: flux_thermal_app
methods.description: Get the heat flux on the boundary.

methods.name: flux_thermal_unbal
methods.description: Get the unbalanced themral flux.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the flowknot group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: flowknot.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the flowknot. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this flowknot is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: htc
methods.description: Get the heat transfer coefficient.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the flowknot id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: flowknot.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the flowknot is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: index
methods.description: Get the index (offset) of a given flow knot.

methods.name: is_hidden
methods.description: Get the hidden state of the zone.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the flowknot flowknot position (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the flowknot flowknot position.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the flowknot flowknot position.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the flowknot flowknot position.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the flow knot pore pressure.

methods.name: propin_vol
methods.description: Get the proppant volume concentration in injected fluid.

methods.name: set_bulk
methods.description: Set the fluid bulk modulus used by this flow knot.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the flowknot extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_fix_fluid
methods.description: Set the indicator of pore pressure variation.

methods.name: set_fix_proppant
methods.description: Set the flag of proppant variation (true = free; false = constant volume fraction).

methods.name: set_fix_thermal
methods.description: Set the thermal condition code (0 = free; 1 = constant temperature; 2 = constant flux).

methods.name: set_flux_fluid_app
methods.description: Set the additional flux source value.

methods.name: set_flux_thermal_app
methods.description: Set the heat flux on the boundary.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: flowknot.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the flowknot group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_htc
methods.description: Set the heat transfer coefficient.

methods.name: set_pp
methods.description: Set the flow knot pore pressure.

methods.name: set_propin_vol
methods.description: Set the proppant volume concentration in injected fluid.

methods.name: set_temp
methods.description: Set the flow knot temperature.

methods.name: stiffness
methods.description: Get the fluid stiffness corresponding to the knot.

methods.name: temp
methods.description: Get the flow knot temperature.

methods.name: timestep
methods.description: Get the fluidflow timestep corresponding to the knot.

methods.name: trans
methods.description: Get the total transmissivity of elements connected to the knot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this flowknot is live.

methods.name: vertexlist
methods.description: Get vertex list of the flowknot.

methods.name: vol
methods.description: Get the volume corresponding to the knot.

methods.name: vol_unbal
methods.description: Get the unbalanced flow volume for the current cycle.

methods.name: vol_unbal_max
methods.description: Get the maximum unbalanced volume during simulation.
